column5: Text
Nothing, I’m fine.
All right, hang on. Is this still about your mom’s book?
No. Not everything is about my mom.
’Cause if you’re still upset about that, we don’t have to go.
Except this is totally about my mom.
Hey, Claire.
Hey, what’s up?
Hi, yeah. Um, I was wondering, if you’re free Saturday night, all my friends are going to a wine tasting.
Sure, I guess. If you don’t think meeting your friends is too big a step.
Why would it be too big a step?
It’s great. It’s Christmastime and Jimmy Stewart’s really depressed and he’s gonna jump off a bridge and kill himself.
Don’t need to see it. Living it.
But then he gets to see what the world would be like if he’d never been born.
Hey, you ever imagine what that would be like? Not being born?
What do you think?
Okay, why don’t you just tell me what it is you have to tell me?
Okay, um, well, look, it’s just that things between you and me have been going pretty quick.
And?
It’s just a little scary.
Well, yeah, but scary good, right?
Today, it’s a Chinese food retrieval robot.
I don’t think that’s going to happen, Sheldon.
No one ever does. That’s why it happens.
Hey. Is the food here? Ooh. What’s that?
That, dear lady, is the Wolowitz Programmable Hand.
Oh, Tesla.
Hi.
Hello.
Hey, how did it go?
Oh, not fun. The doctor shoved a camera up into my sinuses.
I say, uh, how about one, two, three, go?
One-two-three-go? That’s for babies.
Okay, how about, uh, on your mark, get set, go?
That’s for a footrace.
No, it’s chilly outside. Didn’t bring my jacket.
I’m not a child, don’t do that.
Sorry.
Do you know 2001: A Space Odyssey? All right, now that’s soothing.
Look, I get it, this is still my room, we haven’t really made it yours.
No, of course not. How did you know about that?
I did a comprehensive background check.
Yes, I did.
Hearing unimpaired, good.
It would be an incredible honour to work for a man of your brilliance.
How could it? I never told you, and you never bothered to ask.
Well, now I know.
Yeah.
So, Penny, I understand you have a new job.
Yes. I’m a pharmaceutical sales rep.
How did you get paint in your eye?
Because you wouldn’t let me wear safety goggles.
Will you tell this lunatic that Professor Rothman’s office is rightfully mine?
Can’t you take this up with your department chairman?
We tried. His assistant said he was on sabbatical.
Gentlemen, there’s a task I’m trying to accomplish here.
I don’t mean to be an alarmist…
I’m out.
I’m sorry, Ma, I have to stay late at the office.
No, he doesn’t! He’s lying to you!
Will you be quiet?
I know. But if she orders something low-fat I’ll totally give her the full-fat version.
Uh, that’s my water.
What?
My water. You’re drinking it.
Dear Lord! Have you been drinking it?
I’m getting three trains.
Wait, uh, uh, hang on. In my defense…
I heard you can make good money doing that.
Yeah, it’s going okay, but I do miss this sometimes.
Really?
Mmm.
I am so sick of the humiliation.
So, um, Amy, Sheldon tells me you’re a neuro something-or-other.
Neurobiologist. Your check engine light is on.
Yeah, it’s okay.
What up, guys?
Hello, hey!
Penny and I have some big news. We’re engaged.
And I thought me having sex with Emily was gonna be the big news.
Hey, hey, what the hell?
Well, you don’t know the backstory.
I feel cool. Like Puss in Boots.
I always wanted to be a swashbuckler.
Technically, swashbuckler is a combination of two terms.
I don’t know.
Well ask them why they’re calling at this ungodly hour.
How can I ask them when I’m talking to you!
Howard, it’s Leonard, code Milky Green.
Dear Lord, not Milky Green!
I’ve got to go with Leonard on this. He is wrong more than anyone I know.
I just realized I’m on a break. I’ll get someone else.
Well…
Leonard, promise me you will not start a complicated relationship with her.
Yeah, good for you.
That's amazing.
Thanks. I was as surprised as anybody. When they called and told me I won, I didn't  believe them. And then they said, no, you really won. And then I said, cool.
Someone call George R. R. Martin, this guy knows how to finish a story.
I've gotten pretty good at telling it. Well, see ya.
Terrific. Couldn't be better
Oh, bite me.
